data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific discount types, including code-based and automatic pricing. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or examples of these discount types being configured or utilized in the system. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
gaps: No evidence of discount types: percentage, fixed amount, free service.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
